title: 处理客户修改规格、数量和包装
theme: 从 revise / change request / adjustment 开始
goals: 能礼貌确认客户的修改要求，避免漏掉细节
能说明修改规格、数量或包装可能影响价格和交期
能把客户改动整理成清晰的确认句，再继续报价或生产

review.title: Day 08 复习
items: 昨天练了 out of stock、alternative、restock、shortage 和 recommend。
今天练客户临时改要求：改规格、改数量、改包装、改唛头。
客户说 change 时，不要直接 OK，要先确认改动内容、影响和截止时间。

preview.scenario: 客户已经拿到报价或订单已进入准备阶段，但突然要求修改数量、颜色、尺寸、包装、标签或交期。
needToKnow: revise 常用于修改报价单、PI、设计稿或订单信息。
change request 表示客户提出的修改需求，比 change 更正式。
修改可能 affect price and lead time，要提前说明，避免后续争议。

vocabulary.usage: 用于修改报价单、PI、订单信息或文件。
vocabulary.example: I will revise the PI after you confirm the changes.

vocabulary.usage: 用于正式描述客户提出的改动需求。
vocabulary.example: Please confirm the change request before we update the order.

vocabulary.usage: 用于价格、数量、包装或交期的调整。
vocabulary.example: This adjustment may affect the price and lead time.

vocabulary.usage: 用于对比原订单和新修改内容。
用于客户对产品、包装、标签或交期的具体要求。
vocabulary.example: Please send us the updated requirement.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明修改会影响价格、交期或生产安排。
vocabulary.example: This change may affect the production schedule.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明修改包装、标签、颜色或数量带来的新增费用。
vocabulary.example: Customized packaging may require extra cost.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明修改信息必须在某个时间前确认。
vocabulary.example: Please confirm the changes before the deadline.

sentences.label: 确认修改要求
sentences.natural: Do you want to change the order details?
sentences.business: Could you please confirm the exact change request so we can update the order correctly?

sentences.label: 修改 PI
sentences.business: After you confirm the updated requirement, I will revise the PI and send it to you again.

sentences.label: 说明影响
sentences.natural: This change may affect the price.
sentences.business: This adjustment may affect the price and lead time, so I need to check with our factory first.

sentences.label: 确认原数量和新数量
sentences.natural: Do you want to change the quantity from 1,000 pieces to 2,000 pieces?
sentences.business: Please confirm if you want to change the original quantity from 1,000 pieces to 2,000 pieces.

sentences.label: 提醒截止时间
sentences.business: Please confirm the changes before the deadline so we can keep the production schedule.

chatAnalysis.problem: 没有确认具体改哪里，容易造成订单信息错误。
chatAnalysis.better: Sure. Please confirm the exact changes.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Sure. Could you please confirm the exact change request so we can update the order correctly?

chatAnalysis.problem: 太直接，容易让客户觉得你临时加价。
chatAnalysis.better: This change may affect the price.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: This adjustment may affect the price and lead time, so I need to check with our factory first.

chatAnalysis.problem: 缺少前置确认，应该先确认更新后的要求，再修改 PI。
chatAnalysis.better: I will revise the PI after you confirm the details.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: After you confirm the updated requirement, I will revise the PI and send it to you again.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：客户修改数量

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can we change the quantity?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Please confirm the new quantity you need.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Change it from 1,000 pieces to 2,000 pieces.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Got it. I will check if this adjustment affects the price and lead time.

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：客户修改包装

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We want to change the packaging to a color box.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No problem. Please send us the updated packaging requirement.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Will there be extra cost?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Customized packaging may require extra cost. I will check the exact cost for you.

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：客户生产前临时改规格

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We need to revise the size before production.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Please send us the updated size requirement as soon as possible.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Will it delay production?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: It may affect the production schedule, so I need to check with our factory first.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：客户连续修改数量、包装和 PI

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Hi, we need to change some order details.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Could you please confirm the exact change request?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: First, we want to change the quantity.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No problem. What is the new quantity you need?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please change it from 1,000 pieces to 2,000 pieces.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Got it. The original quantity was 1,000 pieces, and the new quantity is 2,000 pieces.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Yes, that is correct.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I will check if this adjustment affects the unit price and lead time.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Second, we want to change the packaging.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Please send us the updated packaging requirement.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We want one piece in one color box.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. Customized packaging may require extra cost.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please check the extra cost.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will check the packaging cost with our factory and update you today.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you also revise the PI?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes. After you confirm all updated requirements, I will revise the PI.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Do you need anything else from us?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes. Please confirm the new quantity, packaging file, label requirement, and delivery address.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Will this change affect the production schedule?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: It may affect the production schedule, so I need to check with our factory first.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We have a deadline for this order.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. Please confirm the changes before the deadline so we can keep the schedule.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What is the deadline for changes?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Please confirm all changes before tomorrow morning because production will start tomorrow afternoon.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Okay, we will send the final files today.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. After receiving the final files, I will revise the PI and update the order details.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please make sure there is no mistake.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Of course. I will send you a final summary for confirmation before we proceed.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：请确认具体的修改要求。
exercises.answer: Please confirm the exact change request.
acceptable: please confirm the exact change request
could you please confirm the exact change request
exercises.hint: change request 表示修改要求。

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更自然：ok change
exercises.answer: Sure. Please confirm the exact changes.
acceptable: sure please confirm the exact changes
could you please confirm the exact change request
exercises.hint: 不要只说 OK，要确认具体修改。

exercises.prompt: 填空：This adjustment may ____ the price and lead time.
客户说要改包装，哪个回复更适合？
options: Please send us the updated packaging requirement, and I will check if there is any extra cost.
exercises.answer: Please send us the updated packaging requirement, and I will check if there is any extra cost.
acceptable: please send us the updated packaging requirement and i will check if there is any extra cost
exercises.hint: 确认更新后的要求，并说明会检查额外费用。

exercises.prompt: 中译英：我会修改 PI 并重新发给你。
exercises.answer: I will revise the PI and send it to you again.
acceptable: i will revise the pi and send it to you again
i will revise the pi and resend it to you

exercises.prompt: 客户说：Will this change delay production? 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: It may affect the production schedule, so I need to check with our factory first.
acceptable: it may affect the production schedule so i need to check with our factory first
this change may affect the production schedule so i need to check with our factory first
exercises.hint: 不要直接承诺不影响，要先和工厂确认。

homework: 把 revise、change request、adjustment、affect、extra cost 各造 1 句。
把 5 个核心句子的 business 版本各读 5 遍。
跟读长对话 2 遍，重点练客户临时修改订单时的确认方式。
tomorrow: Day 10 会练客户投诉、质量问题和补救方案的表达。
